{{Quote|Please stand aside, Captain. We have important business here on Mon Calamari.|Senator Scramblefree|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
"'''Senator Scramblefree'''" was the main nickname given to a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] by a group of angry [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officers during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The senator ordered [[Green Squadron (New Republic)|Green Squadron]] to cover his shuttle's escape from the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], pulling the starfighter unit away from ''[[Pride of Honor]]'', causing the crew to suffer 241 deaths and the ship to be scrapped.

The [[Unidentified Phindian captain|former captain]] of the ''Pride'' confronted the Sullustan and his [[Senator Sneakaway|colleague]] on [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. The senators were told by the angry [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]] and her unintervening onlookers to vote for an upcoming fleet appropriations bill, and that if either of them ever tried to commandeer a Fleet vessel again, the officers would pack them into an escape pod aimed for the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
